description.value: DETAILS Type spell; Addiction minor , Fortitude DC 13 EFFECT This magical drug is typically contained in an amulet of euphoric healing . While worn, the amulet tinges the wearer’s healing magic with a wash of ecstasy, making the recipient of the healing susceptible to mental manipulation by the wearer of the amulet. The recipient of the healing suffers a â2 penalty against all mind-affecting spells cast by the amulet’s wearer. EFFECT Addiction Anytime the wearer casts a healing spell or uses a spell-like ability on a single target, the recipient of the magical healing must succeed at a DC 13 Fortitude save or become addicted to the wearer’s healing spells. The wearer can suppress this effect by shielding the amulet from view with a hand or held item as a free action . EFFECT Duration: 24 hours DAMAGE 1 Wis damage
